title: navarretia longiflora
intro: Navarretia longiflora, also known as the long-flowered navarretia, is a plant species belonging to the phlox family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Navarretia longiflora has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it can also be consumed as a dried herb or added to herbal supplements.
